title: Ceramic Blue Tile
description: Premium ceramic tile with a glossy ocean-blue glaze.
creator: Ariana Moss
styleDescription: A calm Mediterranean-inspired tile that softens modern interiors with color and shine.

title: Sage Stone Mosaic
description: Hand-finished stone mosaic built for spa-like wall accents.
creator: Leo Bennett
styleDescription: Earthy green tones and tactile stone pieces create a grounded, organic statement surface.

title: Geometric Terra Grid
description: A warm terracotta pattern tile with a bold geometric rhythm.
creator: Nyla Jordan
styleDescription: Designed for statement floors, this piece blends desert warmth with contemporary linework.

title: Marble Vein Luxe
description: Polished porcelain tile with a refined white marble appearance.
creator: Mila Harper
styleDescription: A high-contrast luxury finish that gives kitchens and living spaces a gallery-grade polish.

title: Basalt Noir Slab
description: Large matte charcoal tile for dramatic minimalist spaces.
creator: Haruto Vale
styleDescription: Deep graphite color and a dry matte finish make this ideal for modern luxury interiors.

title: Sunlit Sand Ripple
description: Textured beige wall tile inspired by coastal dunes.
creator: Ella Finch
styleDescription: A subtle rippled face catches light beautifully and brings softness to bathrooms and cafes.

title: Indigo Artisan Patchwork
description: Decorative patchwork tile with hand-painted heritage motifs.
creator: Sofia Wren
styleDescription: An expressive mix of floral and geometric marks designed to energize backsplashes and nooks.

title: Concrete Cloud Hex
description: Hexagonal concrete-look tile for modern loft aesthetics.
creator: Mason Reed
styleDescription: Soft industrial tones and a honeycomb silhouette create a clean, design-forward feature wall.
